subcodes.first_line: O my loving God! Through pure bounty Thou didst breathe the spirit of existence and bestow the garment of life [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مهربان يزدان من محض عنايت روح وجود دميدی و خلعت حيات بخشيدی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayers (general or uncategorized), @primordial Covenant; the day of alast
